compliance_cache_used: sprint/compliance-cache/georgia.json (FIRST Georgia page — wrote complete cache including state_income_tax, ui, local_payroll_tax, minimum_wage, overtime, new_hire_reporting, workers_compensation blocks; subsequent GA child pages reuse)
high_concern_flags: factual_uncertainty: prompt-supplied 5.39% rate is OUT OF DATE — HB 463 (signed 11 May 2026 by Gov Kemp, retroactive 1 January 2026) cut the flat rate to 4.99%. Cache and page reflect the post-HB 463 4.99% rate per primary sources (gov.georgia.gov press release; BDO; Wilson Lewis; countrytaxcalc 2026 guide).

factual_uncertainty: future-year rates (2027+) conditional on HB 463 annual revenue triggers — provisional 0.125 ppt annual cuts toward 3.99% floor, but actual rate each January confirmed via DOR Important Tax Updates page in late December.
factual_uncertainty: 0.06% administrative assessment under OCGA 34-8-180 — currently suspended per DOL announcements; verify against individual DOL-626 notice for full confidence.

factual_uncertainty: G-4 14-allowance and exempt review-mailing requirement — confirmed from DOR G-4 page and Wolters Kluwer summary; mailing destination is DOR Withholding Tax Unit but exact street address may have changed (DOR moved Atlanta offices 2023). Verify against the current G-4 form's reverse-side instructions.
link_gate_warn: neighbour-state and Georgia-parent links rendered as plain text per link gate (targets ship wave 3-4)

secondary_cta_rule_check: secondary CTA in masthead changed from Arkansas-style 'Talk to an expert' duplicate to canonical Employer Cost Calculator URL (real destination); tagline-close secondary uses Crossover Calculator (real destination).
linter_retry_notes: Round 1 caught 2 em-dashes in body prose (state-income-tax revenue-trigger paragraph + G-4 answer-first). Replaced with parenthetical phrasing and 'which is'. Round 2 clean 27/27.
